translations.INVALID_CONFIG_DIR_MISSING: Configuration error: 'dir' option is required. Provide a directory path to load API from.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_DIR_INVALID: Configuration error: 'dir' must be a non-empty string path. Received: {value}
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_MODE_INVALID: Configuration error: 'mode' must be either 'eager' or 'lazy'. Received: {value}
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_NOT_LOADED: Cannot perform operation '{operation}' - instance not loaded. Call load() first.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_RELOAD_NOT_IMPL: Reload functionality not yet implemented. This will be added in a future iteration.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_LAZY_NOT_READY: Cannot call function directly in lazy mode - access properties to trigger materialization first.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_LAZY_ASYNC_REQUIRED: Lazy mode requires async operations. Use eager mode for now or implement async getter pattern.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_LAZY_MATERIALIZATION_FAIL: Failed to materialize lazy proxy for '{apiPath}'. Check that the module loads correctly.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_NOT_A_FUNCTION: Cannot call '{apiPath}' - not a function (got {actualType}). Check that the module exports a callable function.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_API_PATH_INVALID: Invalid API path '{apiPath}': {reason}. API paths must be non-empty, properly formatted dot-notation strings that don't conflict with reserved names.
translations.INVALID_CONFIG_MUTATION_DISABLED: Cannot perform '{operation}' - mutation is disabled. Set allowMutation: true to enable API modification operations (add/remove/reload).
translations.MODULE_NO_EXPORTS: Module '{modulePath}' has no exports. Ensure module exports at least one function or object.
translations.MODULE_IMPORT_FAILED: Failed to import module '{modulePath}': {error}. Check that the file exists and has valid syntax.
translations.MODULE_INVALID_EXPORT: Invalid export '{exportName}' in module '{modulePath}'. Got {exportType}, expected {expected}.
translations.CONTEXT_ALREADY_EXISTS: Context for instance '{instanceID}' already exists. Cannot initialize twice.
translations.CONTEXT_NOT_FOUND: Context not found for instance '{instanceID}'. Instance may have been shut down. Available instances: {availableInstances}
translations.CONTEXT_EXECUTION_FAILED: Failed to execute in context for instance '{instanceID}': {error}
translations.NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT: No active context found. This operation requires an active Slothlet instance.
translations.NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_LIVE: No active context - no instance is currently active in live bindings mode.
translations.NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_ASYNC: No active context - function must be called within slothlet API context.
translations.RUNTIME_NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_SELF: No active context - cannot access 'self'. Ensure you're calling from within a Slothlet API function.
translations.RUNTIME_NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_CONTEXT: No active context - 'context' can only be modified within slothlet API calls.
translations.OWNERSHIP_INVALID_MODULE_ID: Invalid ownership registration: moduleId '{moduleId}' is invalid.
translations.OWNERSHIP_INVALID_API_PATH: Invalid ownership registration: apiPath '{apiPath}' is invalid.
translations.OWNERSHIP_CONFLICT: Ownership conflict: Path '{apiPath}' is already owned by module '{existingModuleId}', cannot assign to '{newModuleId}'. Use forceOverwrite: true or removeApi first.
translations.INVALID_DIRECTORY: Invalid directory '{dir}': {error}. Ensure the directory exists and is accessible.
translations.WARN_DIRECTORY_EMPTY: Directory '{dir}' (resolved: '{resolvedPath}') is empty or contains no loadable modules (.mjs, .cjs, .js files). This is valid for add-api workflows but may indicate a misconfigured path.
translations.INTERNAL_INVALID_STATE: Internal error: Invalid state detected - {reason}. This is a bug, please report it.
translations.INTERNAL_INVALID_ARGUMENT: [INTERNAL ERROR] Function '{functionName}' received invalid argument for parameter '{parameter}'. Got {received}, expected {expected}. This is likely a bug in Slothlet.
translations.WARNING_RESERVED_PROPERTY_CONFLICT: User API conflicts with reserved properties: {properties}
translations.WARNING_LANGUAGE_LOAD_FAILED: Failed to load language '{lang}', falling back to English.
translations.WARNING_LANGUAGE_UNAVAILABLE: Language '{lang}' is not available, using English.
translations.ERROR_RUNTIME_IMPORT_FAILED: Failed to import runtime for metadata API: {error}
translations.DEBUG_MODE_ROOT_CONTRIBUTOR_APPLIED: [{mode}] Root contributor pattern applied - function API with {properties} additional properties
translations.DEBUG_MODE_FOLDER_MATCH: [{mode}] Folder/folder.mjs check: moduleName={moduleName}, categoryName={categoryName}, hasAssignment={hasAssignment}, keys={assignmentKeys}
translations.DEBUG_MODE_FOLDER_DEFAULT: [{mode}] Folder/folder.mjs pattern: {categoryName}/{moduleName} - using default export as category
translations.HINT_REFERENCE_REMOVED: The 'reference' export has been removed from '@cldmv/slothlet/runtime'. Reference objects are now merged directly into the API. Access them via 'self.*' instead (e.g., 'self.myRefProperty').
translations.HINT_MODULE_NOT_FOUND: Ensure the module exists and the path is correct. Check for typos in the import statement.
translations.HINT_SYNTAX_ERROR: Check for syntax errors in the module file. Common issues: missing brackets, unclosed strings, or invalid JavaScript syntax.
translations.HINT_CONTEXT_NOT_FOUND: Ensure the slothlet instance is initialized and the context is created before accessing it. Check that you're using the correct instance ID.
translations.HINT_CONTEXT_ALREADY_EXISTS: This context already exists. Check if you're trying to initialize the same instance twice.
translations.HINT_CONTEXT_EXECUTION_FAILED: An error occurred while executing the function. Check the error details for more information.
translations.HINT_NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT: No active context found. Ensure you're calling this function from within a slothlet context (async or live mode).
translations.HINT_NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_ASYNC: No active context found. Ensure you're calling this function from within a slothlet async context.
translations.HINT_NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_LIVE: No active context found. Ensure you're calling this function from within a slothlet live context.
translations.HINT_OWNERSHIP_INVALID_MODULE_ID: The module ID is invalid. Ensure the module was loaded properly and the ID is correct.
translations.HINT_OWNERSHIP_INVALID_API_PATH: The API path is invalid. Ensure the path format is correct.
translations.HINT_OWNERSHIP_CONFLICT: Path is already owned by another module. Options: (1) Use forceOverwrite: true in api.add() options, (2) Set collision config to 'merge' or 'replace', (3) Call api.slothlet.api.remove() first to clear the path.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG: Check the configuration value and ensure it matches the expected type and format.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_DIR_INVALID: Ensure the directory path is a valid string and points to an existing directory.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_DIR_MISSING: The directory path is required but was not provided.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_API_PATH_INVALID: Ensure the API path is a valid dot-notation string (e.g., 'plugins.tools') without empty segments or reserved names (slothlet, shutdown, destroy).
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_MUTATION_DISABLED: API mutation operations require allowMutation: true in the configuration. Use diagnostics: true to access these methods for testing without enabling actual mutations.
translations.HINT_MODULE_LOAD_FAILED: Check the module file for errors. Ensure it has valid JavaScript syntax and exports.
translations.HINT_MODULE_IMPORT_FAILED: Ensure the module file exists and can be imported. Check for syntax errors or missing dependencies.
translations.HINT_MODULE_NO_EXPORTS: The module must export at least one function or object.
translations.HINT_INVALID_DIRECTORY: Ensure the directory path is correct and the directory exists and is accessible.
translations.HINT_WARN_DIRECTORY_EMPTY: Check that the directory path is correct. Empty directories are valid for add-api workflows where modules will be added dynamically.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_LAZY_NOT_READY: In lazy mode, access properties to trigger materialization before calling functions.
translations.HINT_INTERNAL_INVALID_STATE: An internal state error occurred. This is likely a bug - please report it with details.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_LAZY_ASYNC_REQUIRED: Lazy mode requires async operations. Use eager mode or implement proper async patterns.
translations.HINT_RUNTIME_NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_SELF: Cannot access 'self' outside of a slothlet API function context.
translations.HINT_RUNTIME_NO_ACTIVE_CONTEXT_CONTEXT: Cannot access 'context' outside of a slothlet API function. Context can only be modified within slothlet API calls.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_NOT_LOADED: The instance must be loaded before performing this operation. Call load() first.
translations.HINT_INVALID_CONFIG_RELOAD_NOT_IMPL: Reload functionality is not yet implemented. This will be added in a future iteration.
